Bash(# Check if we can use built-in Windows tools
powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\('D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\_card_backup\\anthony_rage.png'\); Write-Host \\$img.Width 'x' \\$img.Height; \\$img.Dispose\(\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Check backup card sizes \(both big and regular\) using PowerShell
powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
foreach \(\\$f in Get-ChildItem 'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\_card_backup\\*.png'\) {
    \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$f.FullName\)
    Write-Host \('regular: ' + \\$f.Name + ' = ' + \\$img.Width + 'x' + \\$img.Height\)
    \\$img.Dispose\(\)
}
foreach \(\\$f in Get-ChildItem 'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\_card_backup\\big\\*.png'\) {
    \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$f.FullName\)
    Write-Host \('big:     ' + \\$f.Name + ' = ' + \\$img.Width + 'x' + \\$img.Height\)
    \\$img.Dispose\(\)
}
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$downloads = 'C:\\Users\\潘雨乐\\Downloads'
\\$names = Get-ChildItem \\$downloads -Filter '*.png' | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -notmatch '屏幕截图|Image_' } | ForEach-Object { \\$_.Name }
Write-Host \(\\$names -join '\\n'\)
Write-Host \('---'\)
Write-Host \('Count: ' + \\$names.Count\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*' | Where-Object { \\$_.DisplayName -like '*godot*' } | Select-Object DisplayName, InstallLocation 2>\\$null; Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall\\*' | Where-Object { \\$_.DisplayName -like '*godot*' } | Select-Object DisplayName, InstallLocation 2>\\$null")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'D:\\Steam121\\steamapps\\common\\Slay the Spire 2\\data_sts2_windows_x86_64\\sts2.dll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
\\$assembly = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFrom\('D:\\Steam121\\steamapps\\common\\Slay the Spire 2\\data_sts2_windows_x86_64\\sts2.dll'\)
\\$type = \\$assembly.GetType\('MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Powers.CustomPower'\)
\\$methods = \\$type.GetMethods\([System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Public -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::NonPublic -bor [System.Reflection.BindingFlags]::Instance\) | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -like '*ModifyCardPlayResult*' }
foreach \(\\$m in \\$methods\) { Write-Host \\$m }
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing
\\$paths = @\(
    'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\CharMod\\images\\card_portraits\\char_mod_strike.png',
    'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\CharMod\\images\\card_portraits\\big\\char_mod_strike.png',
    'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\CharMod\\images\\card_portraits\\violence.png',
    'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\CharMod\\images\\card_portraits\\big\\violence.png'
\)
foreach \(\\$p in \\$paths\) {
    \\$img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\\$p\)
    Write-Host \\"\\$\(\\$p.Split\('\\\\'\)[-2..-1] -join '/'\): \\$\(\\$img.Width\)x\\$\(\\$img.Height\)\\"
    \\$img.Dispose\(\)
}
")

Bash(# 1. 卡牌名异常 - 检查 zh/cards.json 中的格式是否正确
powershell -Command "
\\$zh = Get-Content 'D:\\aMyGameSelf\\ModMaker\\CharacterModTemplate\\CharMod\\localization\\zh\\cards.json' -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json
\\$zh.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'CHARMOD-STEAL\\.title' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \('Key: ' + \\$_.Name + ' = ' + \\$_.Value\) }
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$pck = 'D:\\Steam121\\steamapps\\common\\Slay the Spire 2\\mods\\pestkiller\\pestkiller.pck'
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\\$pck\)
\\$loc = \\$zip.Entries | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'cards.json' }
foreach \(\\$e in \\$loc\) { Write-Host \\$e.FullName }
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)
")
